title: thymus hirsutus
intro: Thymus hirsutus, also known as Woolly Thyme, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This perennial herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as skin conditions like acne and wounds. The health benefits of Thymus hirsutus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion. Thymus hirsutus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
